data.title: BlackRock acquires $172.1M in Bitcoin, strengthening institutional dominance
data.description:
BlackRock, the world’s largest asset manager with approximately $11.6 trillion in assets under management, has executed a significant purchase of 2055 BTC, valued at approximately $172.1 million.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/blackrock-acquires-172-1m-in-bitcoin/

data.title: Treasury Department lifts sanctions on Tornado Cash
data.description:
The Treasury's OFAC sanctioned Tornado Cash in 2022 after claiming North Korean cyber hackers used the platform to launder illicitly obtained cryptocurrency.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/347519/treasury-department-removes-economic-sanctions-against-crypto-mixer-tornado-cash?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: TORN briefly broke through $14, with a 24-hour increase of 63.4%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Perhaps affected by the removal of Tornado Cash from the OFAC sanctions list, the market shows that TORN briefly broke through $14 and is now trading at $14.05, with a 24-hour increase of 63.4% and a market value of approximately $51.669 million.

data.title: Nick Tomaino: Meme coins are neither good nor bad, their true value depends on the number of believers
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News 1confirmation founder Nick Tomaino said that Meme coins themselves are neither good nor bad, and they will not disappear. Those who expect the era of tokens with "real value" may be disappointed, because "real value" varies from person to person. He pointed out that Bitcoin has been born for more than 15 years, and although billions of people still believe that it has no real value, there are also hundreds of millions of people who believe in its value, and its market value has reached 1.6 trillion US dollars. Most memes will die, but a few will continue to exist.

data.title: PI Coin Crashes 13% in 24 Hours – Here’s Why
data.description:
TL;DR Pi Coin has dropped more than 34% over the past week, trading below $1 and registering a trading volume exceeding $665 million. Binance refused to list Pi Coin, creating tensions with the ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/pi-coin-crashes-13-in-24-hours-heres-why/

data.description:
FedEx has revised its financial forecasts downward due to inflation, uncertain demand, and economic challenges..

data.title: Wintermute is suspected of participating in ORCA market making again, transferring nearly 10 million US dollars of tokens in a short period of time and causing the price of the currency to fall
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the deployment address of Orca ($ORCA) transferred tokens worth about $9.62 million to the market maker Wintermute 1 hour ago, suspected to be used for market making or selling.
At present, Wintermute has recharged part of $ORCA into exchanges such as Coinbase, Binance, KuCoin, and Kraken, and still holds 2.2 million tokens on the chain, worth about $7.5 million.
Since the first recharge of tokens to the exchange at 22:18, the price of ORCA has fallen from $3.642 to $3.39, a drop of about 7%. It is reported that Wintermute had on-chain interaction with ORCA as early as December 2024, and it may not be the first time to participate in its market making activities.

data.title: PancakeSwap Protocol Fees Surpass Meteora
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from DefiLlama reveals that PancakeSwap's protocol fees reached $4.69 million in the past 24 hours. This amount surpasses Meteora's $3.38 million, placing PancakeSwap third in the rankings, following Tether and Circle.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/21851245218417?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy On Track To Inject Over $700 Million Into Bitcoin
data.description:
Michael Saylor is determined to keep his word and maintain Bitcoin purchases below $100,000. His company Strategy just confirmed the pricing of its latest stock offering and may have just revealed how much could be invested into BTC. According to Michael Saylor, the offering bumped up the expected net proceeds by about $122 million.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/21/michael-saylors-strategy-on-track-to-inject-over-700-million-into-bitcoin/
